mapper.select: SELECT * FROM plan_training_action WHERE training_day_id = #{trainingDayId} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan_training_action (training_day_id, action_id, action_name, min_sets, max_sets, rest_minutes, sort_order) VALUES (#{trainingDayId}, #{actionId}, #{actionName}, #{minSets}, #{maxSets}, #{restMinutes}, #{sortOrder})

INSERT INTO plan_training_action (training_day_id, action_id, action_name, min_sets, max_sets, rest_minutes, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.trainingDayId}, #{item.actionId}, #{item.actionName}, #{item.minSets}, #{item.maxSets}, #{item.restMinutes}, #{item.sortOrder})
